DiagnosticCode.await-in-sync.zh-CN: 在同步上下文中使用 await。

DiagnosticCode.duplicate-set-field.zh-CN: 重复定义的字段(实际代码)。

DiagnosticCode.global-in-non-module.en: Global variable defined in non-module scope

DiagnosticCode.non-literal-expressions-i.zh-CN: 在 assert 中使用了非字面量表达式。

DiagnosticCode.undefined-doc-param.zh-CN: 未使用注解定义的参数。

EmmyLibraryConfig.ignoreGlobs.en: Ignore globs within this library. eg: ["**/*.lua"]

EmmyLibraryItem.anyOf.1.en: Library configuration with path and ignore rules

EmmyrcCodeAction.insertSpace.en: Add space after `---` comments when inserting `@diagnostic disable-next-line`.
EmmyrcCodeAction.insertSpace.zh-CN: 是否在 '---' 后插入空格。

EmmyrcCompletion.autoRequire.en:
Automatically insert call to `require` when autocompletion
inserts objects from other modules.
EmmyrcCompletion.autoRequire.zh-CN: 自动补全 require 语句。

EmmyrcCompletion.autoRequireFunction.en: The function used for auto-requiring modules.
EmmyrcCompletion.autoRequireFunction.zh-CN: 自动补全 require 语句时使用的函数名。

EmmyrcCompletion.autoRequireNamingConven.en: The naming convention for auto-required filenames.
EmmyrcCompletion.autoRequireNamingConven.zh-CN: 自动补全 require 语句时使用的命名规范。

EmmyrcCompletion.autoRequireSeparator.en: A separator used in auto-require paths.
EmmyrcCompletion.autoRequireSeparator.zh-CN: 自动补全 require 语句时使用的分隔符。

EmmyrcCompletion.baseFunctionIncludesNam.en: Whether to include the name in the base function completion. Effect: `function () end` -> `function name() end`.
EmmyrcCompletion.baseFunctionIncludesNam.zh-CN: 是否在基本函数补全中包含函数名。效果: `function () end` -> `function name() end`。

EmmyrcCompletion.callSnippet.en: Whether to use call snippets in completions.
EmmyrcCompletion.callSnippet.zh-CN: 是否使用代码片段补全函数调用。

EmmyrcCompletion.postfix.en: Symbol that's used to trigger postfix autocompletion.

EmmyrcDiagnostic.en: Represents the diagnostic configuration for Emmyrc.

EmmyrcDiagnostic.diagnosticInterval.en: Delay between opening/changing a file and scanning it for errors, in milliseconds.

EmmyrcDiagnostic.disable.en: A list of diagnostic codes that are disabled.

EmmyrcDiagnostic.enable.en: A flag indicating whether diagnostics are enabled.

EmmyrcDiagnostic.enables.en: A list of diagnostic codes that are enabled.

EmmyrcDiagnostic.globals.zh-CN: 全局变量列表，在该列表中的全局变量不会被诊断为未定义。

EmmyrcDiagnostic.globalsRegex.en: A list of regular expressions for global variables.
EmmyrcDiagnostic.globalsRegex.zh-CN: 全局变量正则表达式列表，符合正则表达式的全局变量不会被诊断为未定义。

EmmyrcDiagnostic.severity.en: A map of diagnostic codes to their severity settings.
EmmyrcDiagnostic.severity.zh-CN: 诊断代码与严重性设置的映射。

EmmyrcDoc.privateName.en: Treat specific field names as private, e.g. `m_*` means `XXX.m_id` and `XXX.m_type` are private, witch can only be accessed in the class where the definition is located.
EmmyrcDoc.privateName.zh-CN: 将特定字段名视为私有，例如 `m_*` 表示 `XXX.m_id` 和 `XXX.m_type` 是私有字段，只能在定义所在的类中访问。

EmmyrcDoc.rstDefaultRole.en:
When `syntax` is `Myst` or `Rst`, specifies default role used
with RST processor.

EmmyrcDoc.rstPrimaryDomain.en:
When `syntax` is `Myst` or `Rst`, specifies primary domain used
with RST processor.

EmmyrcDocumentColor.enable.en: Enable parsing strings for color tags and showing a color picker next to them.

EmmyrcExternalTool.args.en: The arguments to pass to the external tool.

EmmyrcExternalTool.program.en: The command to run the external tool.

EmmyrcExternalTool.timeout.en: The timeout for the external tool in milliseconds.

EmmyrcFilenameConvention.camel-case.zh-CN: 将文件名转换为驼峰(camelCase)命名。

EmmyrcFilenameConvention.keep-class.en: When returning class definition, use class name, otherwise keep original name.
EmmyrcFilenameConvention.keep-class.zh-CN: 返回类定义时，使用类名，否则保持原始名称。

EmmyrcFilenameConvention.pascal-case.zh-CN: 将文件名转换为帕斯卡(PascalCase)命名。

EmmyrcFilenameConvention.snake-case.zh-CN: 将文件名转换为蛇形(snake_case)命名。

EmmyrcFormatConfigPrecedence.preferEdito.en: Prefer discovered .editorconfig files over .gluarc formatter overrides.

EmmyrcFormatConfigPrecedence.preferGluar.en: Prefer .gluarc formatter overrides over discovered .editorconfig files.

EmmyrcFormatPreset.cfc.en: Apply the built-in CFC (Clockwork Fighters Community) style preset: 4-space indentation, spaces inside parentheses, semicolons replaced with newlines.

EmmyrcFormatPreset.custom.en: Apply no preset. Only the `styleOverrides` you configure explicitly take effect; everything else uses the formatter's compiled-in default.

EmmyrcFormatPreset.default.en: Use EmmyLuaCodeStyle built-in defaults. No style overrides are applied.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.en: Typed EmmyLuaCodeStyle overrides for built-in formatting.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.align_array_t.en: Array table layout: `none` keeps items inline, `always` puts each item on its own line, `contain_curly` uses multiline only when a nested table is present.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.align_call_ar.en: Vertically align arguments of multi-line function calls to the opening parenthesis.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.align_chain_e.en: Align chained method / field expressions: `none` disables, `always` aligns all chains, `only_call_stmt` aligns only call statement chains.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.align_continu.en: Align consecutive assignment statements on their `=` sign (`true` aligns within a block, `always` aligns across blank lines, `false` disables).
Align the `--` of inline comments across consecutive lines so they form a vertical column.
Maximum number of blank lines between consecutive statements before they are no longer considered part of the same aligned block.
Align key-value fields in rectangular table literals so that `=` signs line up vertically (`true`, `false`, `always`).
Align arguments across similar consecutive function calls so that matching argument positions line up vertically.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.align_functio.en: Vertically align parameters in multi-line function declarations to the opening parenthesis.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.allow_non_ind.en: Allow comments that start at column 0 to remain un-indented even when inside an indented block.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.auto_collapse.en: Collapse short multi-statement blocks into a single line when they fit within `max_line_length`.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.break_all_lis.en: When a line exceeds `max_line_length`, break every item in the containing list onto its own line rather than only the overflowing item.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.break_before_.en: Place the opening `{` of a table constructor on a new line instead of at the end of the preceding line.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.break_multili.en: When a function call already spans multiple lines, put each argument and the closing `)` on their own lines.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.call_arg_pare.en: How to handle parentheses around single-argument function calls with a string or table literal (`keep`, `remove`, `remove_table_only`, `remove_string_only`, `always`).

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.continuation_.en: Number of extra spaces used for indenting continuation lines when a line is wrapped.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.detect_end_of.en: Detect line endings from file content.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.end_statement.en: Semicolon handling: `keep` preserves existing, `always` adds to all statements, `same_line` adds between same-line statements, `replace_with_newline` replaces semicolons with newlines, `never` removes all.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.ignore_space_.en: Do not normalize spacing after `:` in method call and definition syntax.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.ignore_spaces.en: When `true`, preserve existing spacing inside function call arguments instead of normalizing it.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.indent_size.en: Number of spaces used for one indentation level.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.insert_final_.en: Ensure file ends with a newline.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.keep_indents_.en: Keep indentation whitespace on otherwise blank lines instead of stripping it.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.max_line_leng.en: Column limit before the formatter wraps items onto new lines. Set to `"unset"` to disable line length enforcement.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.never_indent_.en: Do not add extra indentation to wrapped `if`/`elseif` condition expressions.
Do not indent a lone comment that appears inside an `if` branch body.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.quote_style.en: Preferred quote style for string literals. `none` preserves the original style.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.remove_call_e.en: Remove trailing commas that appear at the end of function call argument lists.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.remove_redund.en: Remove redundant parentheses around single-line condition expressions such as `if (x) then`.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.space_after_c.en: Add a space after commas in expressions and argument lists.
Add a space after commas in `for` loop range expressions.
Ensure a single space exists after the comment dash prefix (`--`).

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.space_around_.en: Spaces around assignment operators (`=`). Accepts `true`/`false`, or `"none"` (no spaces), `"always"` (spaces on both sides), `"no_space_asym"` (asymmetric spacing).
Spaces around the concatenation operator (`..`). Accepts `true`/`false`, or `"none"` (no spaces), `"always"` (spaces on both sides), `"no_space_asym"` (space on left side only).
Add spaces around the table append operator (`#t + 1` style appends).
Add spaces inside table braces, e.g. `{ a = 1 }` vs `{a = 1}`.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.space_before_.en: Add a space before Lua attribute annotations, e.g. `local x <const>`.
Add a space before `(` in anonymous function expressions, e.g. `function ()`.
Add a space before `(` in function calls, e.g. `print ('hello')`.
Space handling before a single string or table literal argument: `always`, `only_string`, `only_table`, or `none`.
Add a space before `(` in function declarations, e.g. `function foo ()`.
Number of spaces to enforce before inline comments (`--`), or `"keep"` to preserve existing spacing.
Add a space before `[` in table index expressions, e.g. `t [key]`.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.space_inside_.en: Add spaces inside function call parentheses, e.g. `print( 'hello' )`.
Add spaces inside function parameter list parentheses, e.g. `function foo( a, b )`.
Add spaces inside square bracket index expressions, e.g. `t[ 1 ]`.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.tab_width.en: Display width of a tab character in spaces, used for visual alignment calculations.

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.table_separat.en: Separator character used between table fields (`none`, `comma`, `semicolon`, `only_kv_colon`).

EmmyrcFormatStyleOverrides.trailing_tabl.en: Whether to add or remove a trailing separator after the last field in a table (`keep`, `never`, `always`, `smart`).

EmmyrcGmod.annotationsPath.en:
Path to GMod annotations to load as core library.
When set to empty string or not provided, uses VSCode extension's auto-downloaded annotations (if enabled).
Set to explicit path to override, or use `autoLoadAnnotations: false` in .emmyrc to disable entirely.

EmmyrcGmod.autoLoadAnnotations.en:
Disable auto-loading of annotations (from VSCode or default path).
This takes precedence over extension settings.

EmmyrcGmod.templatePath.en:
Path to a folder containing custom GLua scaffolding templates (`.lua` files).
Built-in templates are used as fallback when a custom one is not found.
Accepts an absolute path or a path relative to the workspace root.

EmmyrcGmodOutline.verbosity.en:
Controls how much detail the document outline shows.
- `minimal`: functions, classes, hooks, net.Receive, timers, concommands only.
- `normal` (default): same as minimal plus non-primitive variables and tables; hides
  control-flow blocks.
- `verbose`: everything including `if`, `for`, `do` blocks and all locals.

EmmyrcGmodOutlineVerbosity.minimal.en: Show only functions, classes, VGUI panels, hooks, net receivers, timers, concommands.

EmmyrcGmodOutlineVerbosity.normal.en:
Show functions, classes, important tables, hooks, net receivers, timers, concommands, and
non-primitive variables. Hides `if`/`for`/`do` blocks.

EmmyrcGmodOutlineVerbosity.verbose.en: Show everything (legacy behavior, includes control-flow blocks and all locals).

EmmyrcHover.customDetail.en:
The detail number of hover information.
Default is `None`, which means using the default detail level.
You can set it to a number between `1` and `255` to customize

EmmyrcInlayHint.closingEndHint.en:
Show an inlay hint after closing `end` keywords indicating what block
they belong to (e.g. function name). Only shown when the block spans
at least `closingEndHintMinLines` lines.

EmmyrcInlayHint.closingEndHintControlFlo.en:
Also show closing `end` hints for control flow blocks (if, while, do,
for). Only effective when `closingEndHint` is enabled.

EmmyrcInlayHint.closingEndHintMinLines.en:
Minimum number of lines a block must span before a closing `end` hint
is shown.

EmmyrcInlayHint.enumParamHint.en:
Show name of enumerator when passing a literal value to a function
that expects an enum.

Example:

```lua
--- @enum Level
local Foo = {
   Info = 1,
   Error = 2,
}

--- @param l Level
function print_level(l) end

print_level(1 --[[ Hint: Level.Info ]])
```
EmmyrcInlayHint.enumParamHint.zh-CN: 是否启用枚举参数提示。

EmmyrcInlayHint.indexHint.en:
Show named array indexes.

Example:

```lua
local array = {
   [1] = 1, -- [name]
}

print(array[1] --[[ Hint: name ]])
```
EmmyrcInlayHint.indexHint.zh-CN: 在索引表达式跨行时，显示提示。

EmmyrcInlayHint.localHint.zh-CN: 是否启用局部变量提示。

EmmyrcInlayHint.metaCallHint.en:
Show hint when calling an object results in a call to
its meta table's `__call` function.
EmmyrcInlayHint.metaCallHint.zh-CN: 是否启用 `__call` 调用提示。

EmmyrcInlayHint.overrideHint.en: Show methods that override functions from base class.

EmmyrcInlayHint.paramHint.en: Show parameter names in function calls and parameter types in function definitions.

EmmyrcInlineValues.enable.zh-CN: 是否启用内联值。用于在调试断点时显示变量值。

EmmyrcReference.fuzzySearch.en:
Use fuzzy search when searching for symbol usages
and normal search didn't find anything.

EmmyrcReference.shortStringSearch.en: Also search for usages in strings.
EmmyrcReference.shortStringSearch.zh-CN: 缓存短字符串用于搜索。

EmmyrcReformat.configPrecedence.en: Controls which takes precedence when both `.editorconfig` and `.gluarc.json` formatter settings apply to the same option: `preferEditorconfig` (default) or `preferGluarc`.

EmmyrcReformat.externalTool.en: External formatter tool configuration. When set, the specified program is used for formatting instead of the built-in formatter.

EmmyrcReformat.externalToolRangeFormat.en: External formatter for range formatting. When set, range format requests use this tool instead of the built-in formatter.

EmmyrcReformat.preset.en: Built-in formatter preset. `default` uses EmmyLuaCodeStyle defaults. `cfc` applies the CFC style preset. `custom` applies no preset — only the `styleOverrides` you configure below take effect.

EmmyrcReformat.styleOverrides.en: Per-key EmmyLuaCodeStyle style overrides applied on top of the selected preset. Keys not configured here inherit their value from the active preset.

EmmyrcReformat.useDiff.en: Whether to use the diff algorithm for formatting.

EmmyrcRuntime.requireLikeFunction.zh-CN: 类似 require 的函数列表。

EmmyrcRuntime.version.en: Deprecated: GMod-only server always uses LuaJIT. Kept for config compatibility.

EmmyrcSemanticToken.renderDocumentationM.en: Render Markdown/RST in documentation. Set `doc.syntax` for this option to have effect.

EmmyrcStrict.allowNullableAsNonNullable.en: Allow nullable types (T?) to be passed where non-nullable (T) is expected.

EmmyrcStrict.arrayIndex.en: Whether to enable strict mode array indexing.
EmmyrcStrict.arrayIndex.zh-CN: 是否启用严格模式数组索引，严格模式下数组取值返回将包含 nil。

EmmyrcStrict.docBaseConstMatchBaseType.en: Base constant types defined in doc can match base types, allowing int to match `---@alias id 1|2|3`, same for string.
EmmyrcStrict.docBaseConstMatchBaseType.zh-CN: doc定义的基础常量类型可以匹配基础类型，使 int 可以匹配 `---@alias id 1|2|3`，string 同理。

EmmyrcStrict.metaOverrideFileDefine.zh-CN: `---@meta`文件的定义完全覆盖真实文件的定义。

EmmyrcStrict.requireExportGlobal.en:
This option limits the visibility of third-party libraries.

When enabled, third-party libraries must use `---@export global` annotation to be importable (i.e., no diagnostic errors and visible in auto-import).

EmmyrcStrict.requirePath.en: Whether to enable strict mode require path.
EmmyrcStrict.requirePath.zh-CN: 是否启用严格模式 require 路径。严格模式时 require 必须从指定的根目录开始。

EmmyrcWorkspace.enableReindex.en: Enable full project reindex after changing a file.

EmmyrcWorkspace.library.en:
Library paths. Can be a string path or an object with path and ignore rules.
eg: ["/usr/local/share/lua/5.1"] or [{"path": "/usr/local/share/lua/5.1", "ignoreDir": ["test"], "ignoreGlobs": ["**/*.spec.lua"]}]

EmmyrcWorkspace.packageDirs.en:
Package directories. Treat the parent directory as a `library`, but only add files from the specified directory.
eg: `/usr/local/share/lua/5.1/module`

EmmyrcWorkspace.reindexDuration.en: Delay between changing a file and full project reindex, in milliseconds.
EmmyrcWorkspace.reindexDuration.zh-CN: 当保存文件时，ls 将在指定毫秒后重新索引工作区。

EmmyrcWorkspace.workspaceRoots.zh-CN: 工作区根目录列表。例如：["src", "test"]
